allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const html = fs.readFileSync\('vjezbe.html', 'utf8'\); const m = html.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\); if \(!m\) { console.log\('no script'\); process.exit\(1\); } try { new Function\(m[1]\); console.log\('JS OK — ' + m[1].split\(/\\r?\\n/\).length + ' lines'\); } catch \(e\) { console.error\('JS syntax error:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }")
